{{Infobox icon
| name = Joy Icon
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Joy [[Icon]] is a rare and unique entity that manifests as a bright violet flower. It functions by providing its user with heightened sensitivity to the emotions and intentions of others, such as fear or respect. The [[Icon]] can also influence physical reality, such as by infusing a seed with [[life]], and it provides its wielder with emotional perspective. While it can be heard as a warm song or a whisper, its presence may diminish when faced with the hostility of the Void.}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Joy Icon]] is a bright violet flower blooming in the sky.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Joy Icon]] can flood a seed with [[life]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c34">''Waybound'', chapter 34</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Joy Icon]] helps [[Mercy]] maintain perspective.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Joy Icon]] can flare in the form of a bright violet flower to bless people.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Joy Icon]] makes [[Mercy]] sensitive to the emotional state of people around her.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Joy Icon]] emits a warm song.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
